dvids.title: 150th TMDE Mobilization Ceremony
dvids.desc: Eight members of the 150th Test, Measurement and Diagnostic Equipment (TMDE) Support Detachment were recognized during a mobilization ceremony at Camp Whitycombe in Happy Valley, Oregon, on April 15, as they prepare to deploy to the Middle East in support of U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) operations
dvids.unit_name: Oregon National Guard Public Affairs Office
